frames.name: Humanitarian Crisis Frame
frames.description: Focuses on stranded Americans struggling to evacuate, emphasizing human suffering and government abandonment
frames.emphasis: Personal stories of stranded citizens, lack of government evacuation assistance, and humanitarian impact on civilians

frames.name: Government Failure Frame
frames.description: Highlights US government's inability or unwillingness to help evacuate citizens despite issuing departure warnings
frames.emphasis: Embassy statements saying they cannot help evacuate citizens, lack of organized evacuation flights, and government abandonment

frames.name: Military Escalation Frame
frames.description: Presents the story as part of broader US-Iran military conflict with focus on strategic implications
frames.emphasis: Military operations, casualty counts, nuclear facilities targeted, and strategic military planning

frames.name: International Comparison Frame
frames.description: Contrasts US response with other nations' evacuation efforts for their citizens
frames.emphasis: UK and France organizing evacuation flights while US has not, highlighting comparative government responses

frames.name: Practical Advisory Frame
frames.description: Treats story as informational guide for Americans needing to leave the region
frames.emphasis: Contact numbers, procedures, embassy guidance, and practical steps for evacuation

outlierPerspectives: Trump's justification that Iran was preparing to attack first, presented without evidence verification (CNBC)
Focus on friendly fire incident with US F-15 jets shot down by allied forces (ABC News)
Detailed coverage of oil market implications and Strait of Hormuz closure (ABC News)
missingContext: Historical precedent for US citizen evacuations in similar conflicts
Legal obligations of US government to assist citizens abroad during emergencies
Detailed timeline of how the US-Iran conflict escalated to this point
Comparison of evacuation capabilities and resources between US and other nations
Analysis of why commercial flights were cancelled but government evacuation flights were not arranged
Economic impact on stranded citizens (costs, lost income, etc.)
Verification of casualty figures and military claims from independent sources
